SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdjustableSemaphore
A Semaphore whose maximum number of permits can be adjusted at runtime.
Consumer<T>
Implement this interface to consume items on the queue.
Consumer.Result
Result of consumption.
DelayRejectPolicy
DelayRejectPolicy
Expiration<T>
Implement this interface to receive notification when a queued item has expired due to maximum number of retries exceeded.
FileQueue<T>
FileQueue is a fast, efficient, persistent queue written in Java and backed by H2 MVStore.
FileQueue.Config<T>
Immutable-style configuration builder for FileQueue.
FileQueueItem
Extend this abstract class to include the properties of a queue item.
MVStoreQueue
Fast queue implementation on top of MVStore.
QueueProcessor<T>
Internal queue processor responsible for dispatching FileQueueItem instances to a Consumer, persisting items that cannot be immediately processed, and retrying them according to the configured delay strategy.
QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm
Algorithm used to calculate the delay between successive delivery attempts.
QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
Builder for constructing a QueueProcessor.
ThreadUtil
Thread and executor utility methods.
